heading: Establishment of Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park
label: 410iii–3 Establishment of Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established the Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park, consisting of approximately 3,000 acres, as generally depicted on the Map.

children.heading: Availability of Map
children.label: b Availability of Map
children.text: The Map shall be on file and available for public inspection in the offices of the National Park Service, Department of the Interior.
